name: Hawaiian-Style Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Macadamia nuts, coarsely chopped, OR sliced almonds
1/3 cup Pineapple, dried or candied, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last four in the bread machine and start the machine.
2. Use the raisin bread setting if available, adding nuts, coconut, and pineapple at the beep.
3. If desired, before serving, glaze with Vanilla Icing and sprinkle with additional fruit and nuts.
Vanilla Icing:
- In a small mixing bowl, stir together 1 cup sifted powdered sugar, 1/4 tsp vanilla, and enough milk (2-3 tbsp) to make an icing of drizzling consistency. Makes 1/2 cup.
- Adapted from More Bread Machine Bounty.
